title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF LIBERTY IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF PALOMPON, PROVINCE OF LEYTE.

chunks.text:
H. No. 452 / 55 OG No. 19, 3441 (May 11, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2132, April 07, 1959 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF LIBERTY IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF PALOMPON, PROVINCE OF LEYTE.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Rejiresentatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitios of Liberty, Calunasan, Cabulihan, Casagawan, Otap and Cabaliwan in the Municipality of Palompon, Province of Leyte, are constituted into a barrio of said municipality to be known as the barrio of Liberty.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, April 7, 1959.
